creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
i may have been unclear. i just wanted to clarify that the historical behavior of the MAKEFLAGS "feature" to infer options is [almost entirely] never what is wanted or expected when crossing boundaries between an outer bmake system of operation and a gmake subsystem. thus, its omission from our WRK_ENV.

thank you Joe for responding on this PR and for your curiosity and scrutiny before handling it.
